name: Apple Pancakes/MD
recipeInstructions:
Mix the whole-grain wheat pastry flour and bran. Add the applesauce and mix well. In a separate bowl, dissolve the yeast in warm water. Let rest for 5 minutes while grating the apples. Stir the apple juice, grated apple, and yeast mixture into the flour mixture. Mix until well combined.
In another small bowl, combine the egg substitute with water and beat until frothy. Add this to the batter and mix gently. Cover and let rest for 15 minutes.
Cook on a medium-hot non-stick griddle or skillet. Cook about 10 minutes on the first side, then about 5-8 minutes on the second side. Flatten the cakes with the back of a spoon if desired to ensure even cooking.
